title: US, UK and Australia Launch New Underwater Drone Project
subtitle: The Aukus alliance aims to protect vital undersea infrastructure with advanced technology.

summary.en: The United States, United Kingdom, and Australia have announced a new project to develop underwater drone technology. This initiative is part of the Aukus military alliance, which focuses on sharing advanced defense capabilities. Officials hope these drones will help protect important undersea cables and pipelines from potential threats. The project is seen as a way to strengthen security in the Indo-Pacific and other regions. While the alliance faces pressure to show results, this new effort marks a significant step forward for the partnership.
summary.zh: 美國、英國與澳洲宣布了一項開發水下無人機技術的新計畫。此倡議是澳英美三方安全夥伴關係的一部分，該聯盟專注於共享先進的國防能力。官員希望這些無人機有助於保護重要的海底電纜與管線免受潛在威脅。此計畫被視為加強印太及其他地區安全的一種方式。儘管該聯盟面臨展現成果的壓力，但這項新努力標誌著該夥伴關係向前邁出了重要的一步。

paragraphs.en: The United States, the United Kingdom, and Australia have announced a new plan to develop underwater drone technology. This project is a key part of their military alliance, known as Aukus, which was formed in 2021. The three nations aim to build uncrewed undersea vehicles (UUVs)—robotic submarines that do not have people on board—to help protect vital infrastructure under the sea. These machines are expected to be ready for use by next year.
paragraphs.zh: 美國、英國與澳洲宣布了一項開發水下無人機技術的新計畫。此計畫是他們於二〇二一年成立的軍事聯盟「澳英美三方安全夥伴關係 (Aukus)」的核心部分。這三個國家旨在打造無人水下航行器（UUV）——即沒有人員在內的機器人潛艦——以協助保護海底的重要基礎設施。這些機器預計將於明年投入使用。

paragraphs.en: The announcement was made by the defence ministers of the three countries during a security meeting in Singapore. According to BBC News, the UK government has promised to contribute £150 million, or about $201 million, to the project. UK Defence Secretary John Healey admitted that the alliance had previously been too slow to produce results. He stated that the three governments are now working much faster to deliver new military technology.
paragraphs.zh: 這項公告是由三國國防部長在新加坡的一場安全會議期間發布的。根據英國廣播公司新聞網 (BBC News) 報導，英國政府已承諾為該計畫投入一億五千萬英鎊，約合二億零一百萬美元。英國國防大臣希利 (John Healey) 坦言，該聯盟過去在產出成果方面過於緩慢。他表示，三國政府目前正以更快的速度合作，以提供新型軍事技術。

paragraphs.en: This new project is part of what the alliance calls "Pillar Two." While "Pillar One" focuses on building nuclear-powered submarines for Australia, Pillar Two is designed to help the three nations work together on advanced technologies. These include artificial intelligence, long-range missiles, and now, underwater robotics. Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth noted that the goal is to create a set of flexible tools for these drones to support operations at sea and keep a military advantage.
paragraphs.zh: 這項新計畫屬於該聯盟所謂的「第二支柱」。雖然「第一支柱」專注於為澳洲建造核動力潛艦，但第二支柱旨在協助三國在先進技術上進行合作。這些技術包括人工智慧、長程飛彈，以及現在的水下機器人技術。五角大廈首長赫格塞斯 (Pete Hegseth) 指出，目標是為這些無人機創造一套靈活的工具，以支援海上行動並保持軍事優勢。

paragraphs.en: One of the main reasons for this project is the growing need to protect undersea cables and pipelines. Much of the world’s internet and energy supplies travel through these cables on the ocean floor. BBC News reports that these structures are increasingly under threat. Officials have pointed to a rise in the number of foreign vessels spotted near important cables in recent years. While some countries have been accused of spying on or damaging these lines, the nations involved in the Aukus project did not directly name which countries they are trying to counter during the Singapore meeting.
paragraphs.zh: 這項計畫的主要原因之一，是保護海底電纜與管線的需求日益增加。全球大部分的網際網路與能源供應都透過這些位於海床的電纜傳輸。英國廣播公司新聞網報導，這些結構正日益受到威脅。官員指出，近年來在重要電纜附近發現的外國船隻數量有所增加。雖然部分國家被指控對這些線路進行間諜活動或蓄意破壞，但參與澳英美三方安全夥伴關係計畫的國家在新加坡會議期間，並未直接點名他們試圖反制的對象。

paragraphs.en: Beyond protecting cables, the drones will be used for surveillance and gathering information. The joint statement from the three nations explained that the drones would carry advanced sensors and weapons systems. This technology is intended to help their forces act quickly against threats in the Pacific, the Atlantic, and the waters of the High North. By working together, the three countries hope to strengthen their ability to stop potential enemies from causing trouble in these areas.
paragraphs.zh: 除了保護電纜外，這些無人機還將用於監控與蒐集情報。三國發布的聯合聲明解釋，這些無人機將搭載先進的感測器與武器系統。此技術旨在協助他們的部隊針對太平洋、大西洋及極北地區水域的威脅迅速採取行動。透過攜手合作，這三個國家希望增強阻止潛在敵人在這些區域製造事端的能力。

paragraphs.en: The Aukus alliance is widely viewed as a way to balance the growing influence of China in the Indo-Pacific region. China has expressed strong opposition to the pact, viewing it as a challenge to its own position. At the same time, the alliance is working to improve its own military strength. For Australia, the deal is particularly important because it will allow the country to receive advanced nuclear propulsion technology from the United States and the UK.
paragraphs.zh: 澳英美三方安全夥伴關係被廣泛視為平衡中國在印太地區日益增長影響力的一種方式。中國對此協定表達了強烈反對，認為這挑戰了其自身地位。與此同時，該聯盟正致力於提升自身的軍事力量。對澳洲而言，這項協議尤為重要，因為它將使澳洲能夠從美國與英國獲得先進的核動力推進技術。

paragraphs.en: However, the alliance has faced some challenges. There have been questions about whether the large-scale submarine projects can be completed on time. In a recent update, officials announced a change in how Australia will acquire its new fleet. Instead of a mix of different types of submarines, Australia will now focus on acquiring three in-service Virginia-class submarines. The Guardian reports that this change is intended to make the supply chain simpler and more efficient, as American shipyards are currently under pressure to increase their production speed.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，該聯盟也面臨一些挑戰。外界對於大型潛艦計畫能否準時完成存有疑慮。在最近的更新中，官員宣布改變澳洲取得新艦隊的方式。澳洲將不再採用混合不同類型潛艦的方案，而是專注於取得三艘現役的維吉尼亞級潛艦。《衛報》(The Guardian) 報導，此變動旨在簡化供應鏈並提高效率，因為美國造船廠目前正承受提高生產速度的壓力。

paragraphs.en: Despite these challenges, the launch of the underwater drone project shows that the Aukus partners are committed to their goals. By focusing on smaller, faster-to-build technology like UUVs, the alliance hopes to show that it can deliver real results. As the global situation remains tense, the ability to protect critical underwater systems will likely become even more important in the years ahead.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管面臨這些挑戰，水下無人機計畫的啟動顯示出澳英美三方安全夥伴關係的成員國致力於達成目標。透過專注於像無人水下航行器這類體積較小、建造速度較快的技術，該聯盟希望展現其能夠產出實質成果。隨著全球局勢持續緊張，保護關鍵水下系統的能力在未來幾年內可能會變得更加重要。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To take action against something in order to reduce its effect or stop it.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 反制、對抗；採取行動以抵銷或阻止某事。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（櫃檯），這裡作動詞用。文中：the nations involved in the Aukus project did not directly name which countries they are trying to counter during the Singapore meeting.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Experiencing a lot of stress or being forced to work very quickly due to high demands.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 處於壓力之下；因需求過大而被迫趕工。
keyTerms.noteZh: 此片語形容目前工作量過大、進度緊迫的狀態。文中：as American shipyards are currently under pressure to increase their production speed.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Currently being used or available for active duty.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 現役的；目前正在服役或使用的。
keyTerms.noteZh: 由介系詞與名詞組成的複合形容詞，指軍事裝備已投入使用。文中：Australia will now focus on acquiring three in-service Virginia-class submarines.

sources.name: BBC News
sources.title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Australia news live: Aukus nations to develop uncrewed vehicles to protect undersea cables; Hanson says she could be PM

quiz.question: What is the primary reason for the change in Australia's submarine acquisition plan mentioned in the article?

options.A: To focus exclusively on developing artificial intelligence.
options.B: To simplify the supply chain and improve production efficiency.
options.C: To reduce the financial contribution required from the UK.
options.D: To allow for the testing of new underwater drone technology.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第七段，官員宣布改變潛艦採購計畫，改為專注於獲得三艘現役的維吉尼亞級潛艦，目的是為了簡化供應鏈並提高效率，因為美國造船廠目前面臨提升生產速度的壓力。選項 A 錯誤，因為人工智慧屬於 Pillar Two 的範疇，而非潛艦採購的考量；選項 C 錯誤，文中並未提到此舉是為了減少英國的資金負擔；選項 D 錯誤，潛艦採購與無人機專案是不同的計畫，並非此調整的主因。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the Aukus alliance's approach to military development based on the text?

options.A: The alliance has successfully met all its original deadlines since 2021.
options.B: The alliance is prioritizing large-scale projects over smaller, faster technology.
options.C: The alliance is trying to demonstrate its effectiveness by diversifying its technological output.
options.D: The alliance is no longer concerned with the influence of other nations in the Indo-Pacific.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據第二段與最後一段，聯盟承認過去進度過慢，因此現在轉向發展如 UUV（無人潛航器）這類較小、建造速度較快的技術，以展現其達成實際成果的能力。這顯示聯盟透過多元化發展（從大型核潛艦到小型無人機）來證明其軍事效能。選項 A 錯誤，因為第二段提到聯盟承認過去進度太慢；選項 B 錯誤，文章最後一段明確指出他們現在正聚焦於小型、建造快速的技術；選項 D 錯誤，文章第六段仍提到聯盟是為了平衡中國在印太地區的影響力。

quiz.question: In the fourth paragraph, what does the word 'counter' mean in the context of the Aukus project?

options.A: To physically attack or destroy something.
options.B: To act in opposition to or to neutralize a threat.
options.C: To count the number of vessels in a specific area.
options.D: To provide financial support for a military project.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在此語境中，「counter」意指對抗或抵銷威脅。文章提到各國擔心海底電纜受損，並指控外國船隻在附近出沒，因此 Aukus 的目標是採取行動來應對這些潛在威脅。選項 A 過於極端，文中並未表示要主動攻擊；選項 C 是對該詞字面意義的誤解，與上下文無關；選項 D 與該詞在軍事外交語境下的定義不符。

quiz.question: What is the central message of this article?

options.A: The Aukus alliance is primarily focused on funding underwater cable repairs.
options.B: The UK is the only country contributing significant funds to the new drone project.
options.C: The Aukus alliance is expanding its military capabilities through new technologies to maintain strategic security.
options.D: Australia has decided to abandon its nuclear-powered submarine plans in favor of drones.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。本文整體論述了 Aukus 聯盟如何透過發展包括無人潛航器（UUV）、人工智慧與飛彈在內的新技術，來提升軍事優勢並保護關鍵基礎設施。這涵蓋了聯盟的目標與策略。選項 A 錯誤，保護電纜只是其中一個動機，而非全部；選項 B 錯誤，文中僅提到英國的具體金額，未排除其他國家的貢獻；選項 D 錯誤，文章並未提到放棄核潛艦計畫，只是調整了採購方式。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
